category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a utility for handling RPM spec files; official GitHub README says it lists and downloads sources and patches in RPM spec files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rpmspectool; official GitHub repository is nphilipp/rpmspectool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes README as its documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository https://github.com/nphilipp/rpmspectool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies RPM spec-file handling; official GitHub README says it lists and downloads sources and patches from RPM spec files.
